description: DocBits Performance Analysis - Response Times, Auto Processing Rates, and Field Accuracy

panels.title: Response Time Analysis - Is DocBits Really Slow?

targets.rawSql:
SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.extraction_time) AS p50_extraction
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.extraction_time IS NOT NULL
  AND d.extraction_time > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.extraction_time) AS p90_extraction
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.extraction_time IS NOT NULL
  AND d.extraction_time > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.extraction_time) AS p99_extraction
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.extraction_time IS NOT NULL
  AND d.extraction_time > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.export_time) AS p50_export
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.export_time IS NOT NULL
  AND d.export_time > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.export_time) AS p90_export
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.export_time IS NOT NULL
  AND d.export_time > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.export_time) AS p99_export
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.export_time IS NOT NULL
  AND d.export_time > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN d.extraction_time < 10 THEN '0-10s (Fast)'
    WHEN d.extraction_time < 30 THEN '10-30s (Normal)'
    WHEN d.extraction_time < 60 THEN '30-60s (Slow)'
    WHEN d.extraction_time < 120 THEN '60-120s (Very Slow)'
    ELSE '120s+ (Critical)'
  END AS time_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS document_count
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.extraction_time IS NOT NULL
  AND d.extraction_time > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')
GROUP BY time_bucket
ORDER BY 
  CASE time_bucket
    WHEN '0-10s (Fast)' THEN 1
    WHEN '10-30s (Normal)' THEN 2
    WHEN '30-60s (Slow)' THEN 3
    WHEN '60-120s (Very Slow)' THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END

panels.title: Extraction Time Distribution (Prod) - How Fast Are We Really?

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', d.created_on) AS time,
  AVG(d.extraction_time) AS avg_extraction_time,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.extraction_time) AS p90_extraction_time
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.extraction_time IS NOT NULL
  AND d.extraction_time > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')
GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', d.created_on)
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Extraction Time Trend (Prod) - Average & P90 Over Time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  oc.name AS organization_name,
  ROUND(AVG(d.extraction_time)::numeric, 2) AS avg_extraction_time,
  COUNT(*) AS doc_count
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.extraction_time IS NOT NULL
  AND d.extraction_time > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')
GROUP BY oc.name
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY avg_extraction_time DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Slowest Organizations by Extraction Time (Prod) - Who Experiences Delays?

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_documents
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.status IN ('finished', 'exported', 'ready_for_validation', 'pending_approval', 'approved')
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS auto_processed_count
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.auto_processed = true
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT 
  ROUND(
    (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.auto_processed = true)::numeric * 100) / 
    NULLIF(COUNT(*)::numeric, 0), 
    1
  ) AS auto_processing_rate
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.status IN ('finished', 'exported', 'ready_for_validation', 'pending_approval', 'approved')
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS manual_processed_count
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND (d.auto_processed = false OR d.auto_processed IS NULL)
  AND d.status IN ('finished', 'exported')
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS exported_count
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.status IN ('finished', 'exported')
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS error_count
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.status = 'error'
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT
  CASE 
    WHEN d.auto_processed = true THEN 'Auto-Processed'
    ELSE 'Manual Processing'
  END AS processing_type,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.status IN ('finished', 'exported', 'ready_for_validation', 'pending_approval', 'approved')
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')
GROUP BY d.auto_processed

SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', d.created_on) AS time,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.auto_processed = true) AS auto_processed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.auto_processed = false OR d.auto_processed IS NULL) AS manual_processed
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.status IN ('finished', 'exported', 'ready_for_validation', 'pending_approval', 'approved')
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')
GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', d.created_on)
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Auto vs Manual Processing Over Time (Prod)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  oc.name AS "Organization",
  COUNT(*) AS "Total Documents",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.auto_processed = true) AS "Auto-Processed",
  ROUND(
    (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.auto_processed = true)::numeric * 100) / 
    NULLIF(COUNT(*)::numeric, 0), 
    1
  ) AS "Auto-Processing Rate"
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.status IN ('finished', 'exported', 'ready_for_validation', 'pending_approval', 'approved')
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')
GROUP BY oc.name
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY "Auto-Processing Rate" DESC

SELECT
  COALESCE(d.doc_type, 'Unknown') AS "Document Type",
  COUNT(*) AS "Total Documents",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.auto_processed = true) AS "Auto-Processed",
  ROUND(
    (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.auto_processed = true)::numeric * 100) / 
    NULLIF(COUNT(*)::numeric, 0), 
    1
  ) AS "Auto-Processing Rate"
FROM documents d
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON d.org_id = oc.id
WHERE d.is_deleted = false
  AND d.status IN ('finished', 'exported', 'ready_for_validation', 'pending_approval', 'approved')
  AND $__timeFilter(d.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')
GROUP BY d.doc_type
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY "Total Documents" DESC

panels.title: Field Accuracy Analysis - How Many Fields Need Customer Correction?

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    (SUM(dr.fields_correct)::numeric * 100) / 
    NULLIF(SUM(dr.fields_total)::numeric, 0), 
    1
  ) AS field_accuracy_rate
FROM document_report dr
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON dr.org_id = oc.id
WHERE dr.is_deleted = false
  AND dr.fields_total > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(dr.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT SUM(dr.fields_total) AS total_fields
FROM document_report dr
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON dr.org_id = oc.id
WHERE dr.is_deleted = false
  AND dr.fields_total > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(dr.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT SUM(dr.fields_correct) AS correct_fields
FROM document_report dr
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON dr.org_id = oc.id
WHERE dr.is_deleted = false
  AND dr.fields_total > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(dr.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT SUM(dr.fields_total - dr.fields_correct) AS fields_touched
FROM document_report dr
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON dr.org_id = oc.id
WHERE dr.is_deleted = false
  AND dr.fields_total > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(dr.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT
  ROUND(
    AVG(dr.fields_total - dr.fields_correct)::numeric, 
    2
  ) AS avg_fields_touched_per_doc
FROM document_report dr
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON dr.org_id = oc.id
WHERE dr.is_deleted = false
  AND dr.fields_total > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(dr.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')

SELECT
  COALESCE(dr.doc_type, 'Unknown') AS "Document Type",
  COUNT(*) AS "Documents",
  SUM(dr.fields_total) AS "Total Fields",
  SUM(dr.fields_total - dr.fields_correct) AS "Fields Touched",
  ROUND(
    (SUM(dr.fields_correct)::numeric * 100) / 
    NULLIF(SUM(dr.fields_total)::numeric, 0), 
    1
  ) AS "Accuracy Rate",
  ROUND(
    AVG(dr.fields_total - dr.fields_correct)::numeric, 
    2
  ) AS "Avg Fields Touched"
FROM document_report dr
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON dr.org_id = oc.id
WHERE dr.is_deleted = false
  AND dr.fields_total > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(dr.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')
GROUP BY dr.doc_type
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY "Documents" DESC

SELECT
  oc.name AS "Organization",
  COUNT(*) AS "Documents",
  SUM(dr.fields_total) AS "Total Fields",
  SUM(dr.fields_total - dr.fields_correct) AS "Fields Touched",
  ROUND(
    (SUM(dr.fields_correct)::numeric * 100) / 
    NULLIF(SUM(dr.fields_total)::numeric, 0), 
    1
  ) AS "Accuracy Rate",
  ROUND(
    AVG(dr.fields_total - dr.fields_correct)::numeric, 
    2
  ) AS "Avg Fields Touched"
FROM document_report dr
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON dr.org_id = oc.id
WHERE dr.is_deleted = false
  AND dr.fields_total > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(dr.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')
GROUP BY oc.name
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY "Accuracy Rate" ASC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Organizations with Lowest Field Accuracy (Prod) - Need Training?

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('day', dr.created_on) AS time,
  ROUND(
    (SUM(dr.fields_correct)::numeric * 100) / 
    NULLIF(SUM(dr.fields_total)::numeric, 0), 
    2
  ) AS field_accuracy_rate
FROM document_report dr
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON dr.org_id = oc.id
WHERE dr.is_deleted = false
  AND dr.fields_total > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(dr.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')
GROUP BY date_trunc('day', dr.created_on)
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  COALESCE(dr.doc_type, 'Unknown') AS "Document Type",
  COUNT(*) AS "Documents",
  SUM(dr.table_values_total) AS "Total Table Values",
  SUM(dr.table_values_total - dr.table_values_correct) AS "Table Values Touched",
  ROUND(
    (SUM(dr.table_values_correct)::numeric * 100) / 
    NULLIF(SUM(dr.table_values_total)::numeric, 0), 
    1
  ) AS "Table Accuracy Rate"
FROM document_report dr
JOIN organisation_cache oc ON dr.org_id = oc.id
WHERE dr.is_deleted = false
  AND dr.table_values_total > 0
  AND $__timeFilter(dr.created_on)
  AND ('$organization' = 'All' OR oc.name = '$organization')
GROUP BY dr.doc_type
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY "Documents" DESC

panels.title: Table Value Accuracy by Document Type (Prod)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM organisation_cache WHERE is_deleted = false ORDER BY name
list.label: Organization
list.name: organization
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM organisation_cache WHERE is_deleted = false ORDER BY name

title: DocBits Performance Analysis
